page_metadata.biotools__summary: This R package is designed to distribute the RecView ShinyApp which aims at providing a user-friendly GUI for viewing and locating recombination positions on chromosomes using pedigree data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This R package is designed to distribute the RecView ShinyApp which aims at providing a user-friendly GUI for viewing and locating recombination positions on chromosomes using pedigree data.
